betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Using an essence of light on a nightmare will create your very own unicorn. Like chickens they float towards the ground taking know fall damage. They also have a secret move that I won't spoil but you will probably figure it out quickly.

You can also have your unicorn charge mobs by using a whip on them, if you are a monster.

You can breed them by using two essence of light on each of them. Or heal them by using a single essence of light on them.

The only armor they accept is crystal armor.
